name_en: 🆕 【 M21060 Blue】For this winter, this LV Pillow Palm Springs mini backpack is crafted with comfortable padded Econyl recycled nylon, embellished with a Monogram embroidery pattern. Soft handles and an adjustable canvas shoulder strap offer versatile styling options, releasing a dynamic style at home, on the street, or at ski resorts. Detailed features 17 x 22 x 10 cm (Length x Height x Width) Z.
